headline_text: Emerging story: Throwback time: the first banner in this dynasty went up in 2025. Since then we've seen 17 title seasons across 8 programs. Texas Tech keeps turning Saturdays into track meets.
Legacy watch: Roster building never stops. Nebraska sits on the top class in the country, and Nebraska is already loading the next wave.

Legacy watch: The championship chase runs through Bowling Green. Devin is sitting on a 41.1% natty shot with the deepest résumé in the field. Bowling Green keeps showing up like a heavyweight in a mid-major body.
Legacy watch: Survive and advance: Texas Tech beat Florida State 35-28 in NCG. Noah keeps breathing.
Legacy watch: The committee loves what Florida State is selling. Nick is parked at #1 with a 0-0 mark.

Legacy watch: Doug (Florida) has the biggest gap between model strength and ranking right now. The computers think this team is better than the poll does.
